entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00049) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00049 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO UPDATE SECTION B SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS TO INCORPORATE AND EXERCISE TWO NEW IDIQ SUB-CLINS (I.E. 3004DB POST AIRPORT ASSESSMENT AND 3016 AC PAYROLL ACTION PROCESSING) IN SUPPORT OF CLINS 3004 POST AIRPORT ASSESSMENT AND CLIN 3016 PAYROLL ACTION PROCESSING.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00050) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00050 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO EXERCISE OPTION PERIOD 3 (01/02/2012 01/01/2013). OPTION PERIOD 3 TASK ORDER HSTS01-12-J-HRM040 REVISES THE CLIN STRUCTURE FOR THE OPTION PERIOD 3 CLINS, DUE TO THE CONTINUING RESOLUTION AND THE REQUIREMENT TO FULLY FUND FIRM FIXED PRICE LINE ITEMS. AS AN ADMINISTRATIVE NECESSITY, THIS MODIFICATION IDENTIFIES THE FULL AMOUNT FOR EACH OPTION YEAR 3 CLIN; HOWEVER, THE CLINS IDENTIFIED HEREIN ARE ONLY EXERCISED AND FUNDED AT THE LEVELS IDENTIFIED IN TASK ORDER HSTS01-12-J-HRM040, AND ANY FUTURE SUBSEQUENT FUNDING MODIFICATIONS, IF AWARDED. ALSO, THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE AND EXERCISE IDIQ SUB-CLIN 4021AB SYSTEMS MAINTENANCE AND SUPPORT SIEBEL LICENSES.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00051) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00051 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO EXTEND THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE OF CLIN 3024 BY ONE MONTH, TO UPDATE SECTION B SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS TO INCREASE THE VALUE OF CLIN 3024 DATA WAREHOUSE (IDW) BY $710,481.00 FROM $4,272,039.62 TO $4,982,520.62, AND TO EXERCISE THE NEWLY ESTABSLISHED CLIN 3024C.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00052) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00052 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO 1) ADD ITEMS 4018A, 5018A, 6018A, 7018A, 8018A AND EXERCISE SUB-CLIN 4018A "HELP DESK EXTENDED HOURS/ EPMP;" 2) TO INCORPORATE THE ADDITION OF THE EMPLOYEE PERFORMANCE MANAGEMENT PROGRAM (EPMP) TO SECTION 6 OF THE STATEMENT OF WORK (SOW) (ATTACHMENT A); 3) EXTEND THE HELP DESK HOURS AS DEFINED IN SECTION 6 OF THE SOW (ATTACHMENT A) ;AND 4) TO INCORPORATE THE REVISED SECTION B SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS (ATTACHMENT B), FOR IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00053) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00053 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO EXTEND THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE OF CLIN 3024 BY TWO MONTHS, TO UPDATE SECTION B SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS TO INCREASE THE CEILING OF CLIN 3024 DATA WAREHOUSE (IDW) BY $1,439,155.00 FROM $4,982,520.62 TO $6,421,675.62, AND TO EXERCISE THE NEWLY ESTABSLISHED CLIN 3024D.
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN UNCHANGED

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00054) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00054 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS CREATE TEN SUB-CLINS THAT PROVIDE FOR INCREASED QUANTITIES OF SF-52 AND BENEFITS PROCESSING TRANSACTIONS. OVER OY3 - OY7, THESE CLINS ENABLE 585,000 ADDITIONAL TRANSACTIONS AT A VALUE OF $18,263,700.00. THE SUB-CLINS CREATED BY THIS ACTION WILL BE EXERCISED AND FUNDED AS NECESSARY VIA FUTURE TASK ORDERS. THIS MODIFICATION CONSTITUTES NO INCREASE TO THE OVERALL CONTRACT CEILING.
THE FOLLOWING CLINS WILL BE CREATED AGAINST SECTION B SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS.
4015AC, 4015AD, 5015AC, 5015AD, 6015AC, 6015AD, 7015AC, 7015AD, 8015AC, 8015AD
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN UNCHANGED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00055) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00055 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO ADD SUB-CLIN 3024E. THIS SUB-CLIN, CREATED FOR ADMINISTRATIVE PURPOSES, EFFECTIVELY EXTENDS THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE OF OY 2 CLIN 3024 BY 2 MONTHS (APRIL AND MAY 2012) AND INCREASES THE CLIN 3024 CEILING BY $535,928.76 FROM $6,421,675.62 TO $6,957,604.38. THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE OF CLIN 3024 IS NOW 2/1/2011 - 5/31/2012. CONTRACT SECTION B SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS IS UPDATED ACCORDINGLY.
ADDITIONALLY, THIS MODIFICATION WILL INCORPORATE THE FOLLOWING ADMINISTRATIVE CHANGES AS DESCRIBED IN 14(C), 14(D), AND 14(E). AS SUMMARIZED:
1) LOCKHEED MARTIN WILL NOW CONDUCT MONTHLY SCANS OF SERVERS. 2) LOCKHEED MARTIN SHALL BE REIMBURSED FOR ODC'S ASSOCIATED WITH TRAVEL (CONTINGENT ON COTR APPROVAL). 3) A WAGE DETERMINATION HAS BEEN ADDED FOR MADISON AND LIMESTONE COUNTIES IN ALABAMA.
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN UNCHANGED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00056) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00056 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO REMOVE 40,000 COMPUTER BASED TESTS (CBTS) FROM FIRM-FIXED PRICE (FFP) CLIN X003 AND PLACE THE REMOVED 40,000 CBTS ON A NEWLY CREATED INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) SUB-CLIN X003AA. THE FFP CLIN X003 RETAINS ALL 132 MOBLE CBTS IT CONTAINED PREVIOUSLY. THE FORMER SUB-CLIN X003AA (WITH 50,000 IDIQ CBTS) IS NOW SUB-CLIN X003AB. THE FORMER SUB-CLIN X003AB (WITH 50,000 IDIQ CBTS) IS NOW SUB-CLIN X003AC. SUB-CLIN X003AD IS CREATED TO ADD 33 ADDITIONAL MOBILE CBTS ON AN IDIQ BASIS EACH YEAR (OY3 - OY7). AS A RESULT OF THIS ACTION, THE CLIN X003 CEILING IS INCREASED BY A CUMULATIVE TOTAL OF $577,678.20 FROM $71,170,799.00 TO $71,748,477.20. THERE IS NO RESULTANT INCREASE TO THE OVERALL HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 CEILING. CONTRACT SECTION B SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS IS UPDATED ACCORDINGLY.
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN UNCHANGED.
ADDITIONALLY, THIS MODIFICATION WILL INCORPORATE THE FOLLOWING ADMINISTRATIVE CHANGES AS DESCRIBED IN 14(C), 14(D), AND 14(E). AS SUMMARIZED:
1) LOCKHEED MARTIN WILL NOW CONDUCT MONTHLY SCANS OF SERVERS. 2) LOCKHEED MARTIN SHALL BE REIMBURSED FOR ODC'S ASSOCIATED WITH TRAVEL (CONTINGENT ON COTR APPROVAL). 3) A WAGE DETERMINATION HAS BEEN ADDED FOR MADISON AND LIMESTONE COUNTIES IN ALABAMA.
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN UNCHANGED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00057) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00057 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO ADD SUB-CLIN 1025A. THIS SUB-CLIN, CREATED FOR ADMINISTRATIVE PURPOSES, EFFECTIVELY EXTENDS THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE OF BASE PERIOD CLIN 1025 BY 3 MONTHS (AUGUST, SEPTEMBER, AND OCTOBER 2012) AND INCREASES THE CLIN 1025 CEILING BY $121,462.03 FROM $1,077,580.76 TO $1,199,042.79 SO THAT A TASK ORDER MODIFICATION WITH $121,462.03 IN FUNDING MAY BE PLACED AGAINST CLIN 1025 TO FUND THE PERFORMANCE PERIOD OF MAY 15, 2012 - OCTOBER 31, 2012 (5.5 MONTHS). THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE FOR CLIN 1025 IS NOW 09/14/2009 - 10/31/2012. CONTRACT SECTION B SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS IS UPDATED ACCORDINGLY.
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN UNCHANGED.
ADDITIONALLY, THIS MODIFICATION WILL INCORPORATE THE FOLLOWING ADMINISTRATIVE CHANGES AS DESCRIBED IN 14(C), 14(D), AND 14(E). AS SUMMARIZED:
1) LOCKHEED MARTIN WILL NOW CONDUCT MONTHLY SCANS OF SERVERS. 2) LOCKHEED MARTIN SHALL BE REIMBURSED FOR ODC'S ASSOCIATED WITH TRAVEL (CONTINGENT ON COTR APPROVAL). 3) A WAGE DETERMINATION HAS BEEN ADDED FOR MADISON AND LIMESTONE COUNTIES IN ALABAMA.
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN UNCHANGED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00058) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00058 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO EXERCISE IDIQ SUB-CLINS 4004BA AIRPORT ASSESSMENT, 4005AA BACKGROUND CHECKS, AND 4016AA PAYROLL ACTION PROCESSING.
TASK ORDER HSTS01-12-J-HRM040.P00004 FUNDED 4004BA AIRPORT ASSESSMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,568,369.73.
TASK ORDER HSTS01-12-J-HRM040.P00005 WILL FUND 4005AA BACKGROUND CHECKS AT $173,350.00 AND 4016AA PAYROLL ACTION PROCESSING AT $594,150.00.
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN UNCHANGED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)
